# o2-scalpel-systemverilog

Scalpel refactor MCP server for SystemVerilog via verible-verilog-ls

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-systemverilog --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `verible-verilog-ls` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .sv, .svh, .v, .vh

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply diagnostic quick-fixes (lint warnings, syntax issues) |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
